description: This file provides utility functions for splitting a string into tokens based on spaces and storing valid tokens in a linked list. It includes a public 'split' function and private helper functions for validation and addition.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits the input string into tokens separated by spaces, returning a LinkedList of valid tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if it passes validation.

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks if a token is non-empty.
